business.name: H 2 O Plumbing & Trade Bathrooms Ltd
business.tagline: Your Local Plumbing & Bathroom Trade Experts

contact.address: 968 Stratford Road (opposite the College Arms Pub), Birmingham B11 4BU

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Great trade counter — always have the parts I need in stock. Staff know their stuff and give solid advice. My go-to for all plumbing supplies in Birmingham.

sample_reviews.author: Karen M
sample_reviews.text: Absolutely stunning bathroom showroom. Helped us choose a full suite at a really competitive price. Installation team was recommended too and did a brilliant job.

sample_reviews.author: David H
sample_reviews.text: Reliable local merchant with good stock levels and fair trade pricing. Parking is easy and the staff are always helpful and friendly.

brand.usp: H 2 O Plumbing & Trade Bathrooms Ltd is Birmingham's trusted local plumbing merchant and bathroom showroom, offering trade-quality supplies and stunning bathroom designs all under one roof.
brand.hero_headline: Birmingham's Trusted Trade Plumbing & Bathroom Specialists
brand.about_paragraph: We're H 2 O Plumbing & Trade Bathrooms Ltd, based right here on Stratford Road in Birmingham. We supply trade professionals and homeowners alike with everything from everyday plumbing materials to full bathroom suites and design services. Whether you're a plumber needing reliable stock at trade prices or a homeowner planning a full bathroom renovation, we've got you covered.
